title: pavonia hieronymi
intro: Pavonia hieronymi, also known as the red sage or Mexican rosemallow, is a flowering plant species within the family Malvaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help soothe wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The plant is rich in flavonoids and glycosides, offering various health benefits such as antioxidant, antimicrobial, and anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions, including digestive issues and skin problems.
